packageRules.description: Do not let Renovate pin or bump the setup-python python-version. The GitHub Actions runner images lag CPython patch releases, so pinning to the newest patch breaks setup-uv/setup-python until the runners catch up. Keep the major.minor spec (3.14) and manage supported versions by hand.
The oss-fuzz base image republishes its :latest digest daily, which otherwise opens a digest-bump PR every day. Refresh the fuzzing base image only once a month.
schedule: before 3am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: marshmallow is a benchmark-only comparison dependency, capped at <4.0.0 by dataclasses-json (also benchmark-only in the bench-world group), whose latest release has no marshmallow 4 support. A marshmallow 4 bump is unsatisfiable and cannot lock, so hold it on the 3.x line until dataclasses-json supports 4 or is dropped from the benchmark.
